<p class="key-answer" data-question="Larotrectinib Sulfate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Larotrectinib Sulfate</strong> 目前有 <strong>25 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Larotrectinib Sulfate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vitrakvi as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult and paediatric patients with solid tumours that display a Neurotrophic Tyrosine Receptor Kinase (NTRK) gene fusion,  who have a disease...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（99.2%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（99.0%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（98.9%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（98.9%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（98.7%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（98.6%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（98.6%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（98.6%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.4%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（98.3%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（98.3%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（98.3%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（98.2%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（98.2%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（98.1%）</li>
<li>hyperthyroidism（98.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
